## Definition of Ready Inputs

Before this PR can be reviewed or merged, the following inputs MUST be linked or provided. 

- [ ] **Spec/PRD**: Link to the Product Requirements Document or Specification.
- [ ] **Acceptance Criteria / Test Scenarios**: Link to or list the Given/When/Then criteria.
- [ ] **Solution / Design Plan**: Link to the technical design or list the architectural approach.

## PR Quality Checklist

- [ ] I have written automated tests for these changes.
- [ ] My changes pass the CI gate without regressions.

---
**Note to reviewer**: Do not merge this PR if any of the above boxes are unchecked. The CI Gate will automatically block the merge.
